title: Uniface Glossary
text: Uniface Glossary The glossary defines the terminology used in Uniface and the Uniface documentation. Terms can be specific to Uniface but might include general industry or third-party terms. Refer to the applicable terms under the following alphabetical sections: Glossary: A Glossary: B Glossary: C Glossary: D Glossary: E Glossary: F Glossary: G Glossary: H Glossary: I Glossary: J Glossary: K Glossary: L Glossary: M Glossary: N Glossary: O Glossary: P Glossary: R Glossary: S Glossary: T Glossary: U Glossary: V Glossary: W Glossary: X, Y, Z Was this topic helpful?
